english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al Asr – The Time

By Time!
Al Asr – The Time

Man is indeed in loss,
Al Asr – The Time

arabic text: إِلَّا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا بِالْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا بِالصَّبْرِ
english translation text:
except those who have faith and do righteous deeds, and enjoin one another to [follow] the truth, and enjoin one another to patience.
Al Asr – The Time
